\SM[double]\sa[124]\SE[33-nb]\n[1]-kunnnnnn~, you came at the perfect time--♥
\sa[133]\SE[9]You see, right now~, I realllllly~ want to try out the new latte they have at the cafe--
\sa[135]\SE[9]Oh? And what a coincidence it is, there's a cafe right in front of us~
Do you not feel the craving for it yourself, mister \n[1]-kun~?
\SM[double]\SE[32]But wait, there's more--! If you opt for it right now, Shino-san here
will treat you to a free glass! Offer valid only for now~♪
I saw her in town so I called out to her, and she immediately
started trying to push me into the cafe.
The way she's hopping around like a bunny with her eyes sparkling like that is just...
\sa[128]\SE[27]Ah, eh? W-What did you say just now...?
Damn, I ended up saying what I was thinking out loud.

Trying to get rid of this awkward air between us, I grabbed her hand and pulled her to 
the cafe.
I gave her befuddled self a glance, and with an itchy feeling in
my heart, we quickly made our way to the cafe.

...Somehow her face feels redder than usual.
She didn't seem her normal self, so I asked what she was up to.

Yeah, that's it, I was taking a break!
\SE[36-nb]E-Eheheh, maybe that's enough of a break though?

if she's that energetic then it's probably not a cold or anything. What a relief.

Are you here because of your dad? Or is it for onee-chan?
\SE[9]I'm actually meeting up with someone~. I was just wandering around
town when PrettyGal invited me for a night of karaoke over RIME~♪
\SE[13-nb]Come to think of it, we've never gone to karaoke just ourselves, have we?
Let's go together next time. I want to hear you sing, \n[1].
\SM[pop]\sa[121]\SE[2]Wah, I just got a RIME. Is she gonna be here soon?
It's not like things are awkward between us or anything, but I'll leave before she arrives.
I waved to Shino and left the place behind.
\SE[6-nb]You can just say hi if you're there, you know~
\SE[5-nb]Fufuh--, what's got you all the way out here? Aren't you
still just a bit too young to go into a place like this, \n[2]~?
Are you trying to 'invite' this oba-san in?
\sa[127]\SE[19-nb]Fufuh--, I wonder what I should do~? Shino-chan would get pretty mad,
and you wouldn't feel all that satisfied doing it with like an
oba-san like me, no? But... if you still want to then~...♪
\SE[10-nb]Oh my, did you take it seriously?
Fufuh--. Just wait till you're a bit older, okay? See you.
\SE[2-nb]I'll definitely make it up to you...♥ I'll do something
I can't exactly go inside by myself...
\SM[tremble]\se[17-nb]I do think I'm worrying too much, but if an old lady like me
went into such a trendy by herself, the attention would be a bit...
\sa[126]\SE[7-nb]What I'm doing here, in front of the cafe?
Erhm, that's, uhm... Promise you won't laugh?
\sa[128]\SE[18-nb]I want to try that new latte they've come out with, but I'm not sure if it's okay
for an old lady like me to go into such a trendy cafe alone...
I couldn't even imagine Ayano oba-san, who's always so well put together being this
adorable over something like this. I couldn't help the laughter that escaped out of me.
\SM[stamp]\sa[131]\SE[25-nb]Aaah~! I told you not to laugh~!
Leaving Ayano oba-san behind, whose face looked like it had a
huff and puff! sfx bubble attached, I went straight into the cafe.
\sa[126]\se[17-nb]Did you finally run out of patience for this old lady?
Uu--, of course... who'd want to talk to such a negative
I returned to Ayano oba-san's side with the new latte in my hands.
When I handed it to her, the tears in her eyes started vanishing
and a smile returned to her face.
B-But I feel so bad, I can't accept it...
[I think the cafe staff would like it too, if a beauty like you walked in, Ayano oba-san.]
Along with that line, I made her accept the drink. I think came out pretty cool.
...Of course, I wished I could say a line like that to Shino instead,
but that's that, and this is this.
\sa[133]\SE[11-nb]Ufufuh--, I'll just have to accept it then.
Thank you♪ My heart feels all young again today~♥
\SE[2-nb]I'll make it up to you sometime... Okay?♥ You've grown into
such a cool boy while I wasn't looking... you've made oba-san so proud~
\SE[11-nb]Oh my, I'm sorry. I have to return to work now.
\SE[21-nb]See ya~. It's dark out so be careful on the way home~♪
\SM[nod]\SE[8]The me who wants to get some nice drink in vs the me who
wants to get home quick and treasure Shino-chan... Fight--!
\SM[nod]\SE[20-nb]Wait...? Wouldn't getting one or two drinks in and then going home and
pestering Shino-chan be the best combo...? Clang-Clang-Claaang, Draw!
Ahahah, looks like I showed you something embarrassing...
\sa[133]\SE[20-nb]Ufufuh~, that's right~, I was thinking of hitting up the bar
\SE[1]I'd love to go in with you, but that really would be too much.
Let's go in together when you grow up big and strong, okay?
A night out at the bar with a mature adult woman. It's a realm yet beyond
my comprehension, but I'm sure it's the combination of dreams.
I wouldn't want to get in her way, so I gave her a quick wave
and then left the place behind.
\SE[21-nb]Yeah, see ya. It's dark out so be careful on the way home~♪
\SE[13-nb]Sadly, it's almost time for onee-chan to clock in...
Let's go on a date here when time allows, okay~? It's a promise~
What's up~? What's got you out so early? Heading to that cafe?
\SE[20-nb]Ufufuh~, I feel you, I do~. I used to come here a lot
back in my student days too. Man, so nostalgic~
It's close to the office still so I still come here regularly, of course.
\SM[double]\SE[24-nb]Aah~. If I had some time, I'd have loved to go on a cafe date with you, \n[2]~.
\SE[13-nb]Sadly, it's almost time for onee-chan to clock in...
Let's go on a date here when time allows, okay~? It's a promise~
